title: cyperus diandrus
intro: Cyperus diandrus, also known as the desert papyrus or umbrella papyrus, is a species of sedge that is native to arid regions of the Americas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cyperus diandrus include relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing irritated throats. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
